name: securitysentinel
description: Flutter Bounty Hunter - Autonomous Mobile Exploit Framework

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../core/fbhbot && npm install && cd ../../backend && npm install && cd ..
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n "mobsf,frontend,fbhbot,backend,ai-hunter" -c "cyan,green,yellow,magenta,blue" "npm run dev:mobsf" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:fbhbot" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:ai-hunter"
